display.purpose: Page titles, card names, pricing emphasis, compact brand strip (h1–h4).

body.purpose: UI text, forms, tables, filters, and functional copy.

shadows.name: coral-hover
shadows.purpose: Card and interactive surface hover elevation.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Filter sidebar visible; two-row navbar fully expanded.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Spotlight Coral button for primary actions with snap hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.68 0.16 28); color: oklch(0.99 0.01 60); padding: 0 1rem; height: 2.25rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.60 0.17 28); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Stage Gold button for premium CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { background: oklch(0.80 0.12 80); color: oklch(0.17 0.02 30); padding: 0 1rem; height: 2.25rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; transition: background 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { background: oklch(0.75 0.13 80); }

components.name: Listing Card (Grid)
components.description: Dense marketplace listing card with coral price and circular action.
components.css: .ds-listing-card { border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.012 60); background: oklch(0.99 0.01 60); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-listing-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px oklch(0.68 0.16 28 / 0.12); } .ds-listing-price { color: oklch(0.68 0.16 28); font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 600; } .ds-listing-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 1rem; }

components.name: Filter Sidebar Panel
components.description: Sticky left filter panel with checkbox facets and price range.
components.css: .ds-filter-sidebar { position: sticky; width: 15rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.012 60); background: oklch(0.99 0.01 60); padding: 1.25rem; } .ds-filter-sidebar input[type=checkbox] { accent-color: oklch(0.68 0.16 28); }

components.name: Results Toolbar
components.description: Result count, sort select, and grid/list view toggle.
components.css: .ds-results-toolbar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.012 60); background: oklch(0.99 0.01 60); padding: 0.75rem 1rem; }

components.name: Pill Search
components.description: Rounded-full search bar in marketplace top bar.
components.css: .ds-pill-search { display: flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.012 60); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.94 0.012 60) 50%, transparent); padding: 0 0.375rem 0 1rem; } .ds-pill-search:focus-within { border-color: oklch(0.68 0.16 28 / 0.4); background: oklch(0.99 0.01 60); }

narrative.overview:
SnapCos is a playful, theatrical costume rental marketplace. Brand colors (coral, gold, curtain black) come from the logo. The storefront uses a utility-forward marketplace layout: two-row top bar with pill search, left filter sidebar, results toolbar, filter chips, and dense listing cards. Vendor and admin dashboards share the same surface language — rounded-xl panels, muted page backgrounds, coral active nav — without the full browse sidebar.

Real data only on listing cards. No fabricated ratings, sold counts, or sale prices.
keyCharacteristics: Spotlight Coral primary actions and active states
Stage Gold sparkle accents used sparingly
URL-driven filter state for shareable views
Soft coral-tinted hover shadows on cards
Rounded-xl dashboard surfaces on muted page backgrounds

rules.name: The Spotlight Rule
rules.body: Coral owns primary actions and active navigation. Gold accents sparkle moments — never compete with coral on the same control.

rules.name: The Snap Contrast Rule
rules.body: Headlines use Fraunces at bold weights; body stays in DM Sans. Do not mix display font in dense data tables.

rules.name: The Warm Depth Rule
rules.body: Elevation responds to interaction with coral-tinted shadows on hover. Surfaces are warm and approachable at rest.

rules.name: The Real Data Rule
rules.body: Listing cards show only fields the API provides: price, name, category, size, theme. Never fabricate ratings, sold counts, or discount prices.

rules.name: The URL State Rule
rules.body: Browse filters live in URL search params so filtered views are shareable and back-button friendly.

dos: Do use Spotlight Coral for primary buttons, active nav, filter chips, and focus states.
Do use the marketplace shell (muted page bg + card panels) on browse surfaces.
Do drive browse state from URL search params.
Do use Fraunces for h1–h4 and display moments.
Do show only real listing data on cards.
donts: Don't use monochrome bg-foreground for primary actions — use coral tokens.
Don't fabricate ratings, sold counts, or sale prices on listing cards.
Don't overuse gold — it should sparkle, not dominate.
Don't revert to tall hero-only browse or flat colorless editorial minimalism.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default treatment.
